title: pleopeltis punctata
intro: Pleopeltis punctata, also known as the spotted polypody fern, is a type of epiphytic fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pleopeltis punctata include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
